columns.Name: FEEDBACK_REQ_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the Feedback Request table

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_REQ_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Column stores common id for all requests generated for a user together in a single action

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_REQ_TMPL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to Feedback requests base table

columns.Name: REQUESTED_FOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person for whom Feedback is requested

columns.Name: REQUESTED_FOR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Column stores assignment Id of the Requested For Person if available

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person who will provide the feedback

columns.Name: SHARE_WITH_MGR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to share the feedback with manager.

columns.Name: SHARE_WITH_WKR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to share the feedback with worker.

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Due date for the feedback requested

columns.Name: DUE_DATE_ALERT_SENT
columns.Comments: Flag to check if notification was sent to feedback provider for completion before due date ends

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
